introSection: Little Dipper is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Quassy Amusement Park in Middlebury, Connecticut, USA. It was manufactured by Allan Herschell Company and opened in 1952.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: This roller coaster is a copy of the Little Dipper model. It is designed for younger children who cannot ride the bigger rides, and has a simple oval layout.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The trains are painted yellow and blue.

fullText:
Little Dipper is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Quassy Amusement Park in Middlebury, Connecticut, USA. It was manufactured by Allan Herschell Company and opened in 1952.



This roller coaster is a copy of the Little Dipper model. It is designed for younger children who cannot ride the bigger rides, and has a simple oval layout.

Black track and grey supports.

The trains are painted yellow and blue.
